commits.message: add: coffee shop slideshow carousel images (4:5) for Instagram
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: docs: rename voice engine and dating files to character-branded names
commits.author: shalombook

commits.message: docs: add voice engine system prompt for Reddit bot
commits.author: shalombook

panels.title: Add: Coffee shop slideshow carousel images
panels.scene: Villagers lined up outside a coffee shop. They are staring in awe at a wooden slideshow carousel displaying photos of coffee beans and latte art. Some villagers are crying tears of joy.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The resolution! The aspect ratio! It's... it's glorious!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: They're just coffee pictures for Instagram.

panels.title: Rename voice engine and dating files
panels.scene: The knight stands in front of a stone filing cabinet. He casually changes the labels on two folders from 'voice_engine_001' and 'dating_profiles' to 'sir_reginald_voice' and 'princess_petunia_matches'. The villagers are throwing rose petals at his feet.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He has blessed us with CHARACTER-BRANDED nomenclature!

panels.title: Add voice engine system prompt for Reddit bot
panels.scene: A giant mechanical Reddit bot wearing a crown is dispensing wisdom (actually just nonsensical comments) to kneeling villagers. The knight is holding a tiny scroll of code he just added that made the bot function.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The prophecies! They are being AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: It's just a prompt telling it what to say.

panels.title: 3 commits. 1 bot. Countless blessings.
panels.scene: The knight is sitting on a crate looking utterly bored. In the background, villagers are carving his likeness into a giant coffee bean. A banner reads 'All hail the file renamer'.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: Let us celebrate the great refactoring!
